title: Section 45
content: The 1 [State Government] may direct the submission of such returns by the Inspector-General and other police-officers as to such 1 [State Government] shall seem proper, and may prescribe the form in which such returns shall made.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950, for "Provincial Government" which had been subs. by the A.O. 1937, for "L.G.".
